title: BRANDLE OS — ENGRAMAESTRO THREAD VAULT INTEGRATION PACK

summary: Integrates ENGRAMAESTRO Thread Vault format into BRANDLE OS V4ULT and seeds Prompt Vault with canonical engine prompts extracted from the vault.
